info.title: DebugMcp
info.description: MCP server that gives AI agents full debugging capabilities for .NET applications. Supports 34 tools for breakpoints, stepping, inspection, memory analysis, module exploration, code analysis (Roslyn), exception autopsy, and process I/O — all via the Model Context Protocol. Built on ICorDebug for native, zero-overhead .NET debugging on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --stderr-logging
options.description: Also write logs to stderr alongside MCP notifications [default: False]

options.name: --no-roslyn
options.description: Disable Roslyn code analysis tools (use when JetBrains MCP provides equivalent functionality) [default: False]

options.name: --no-symbols
options.description: Disable automatic PDB symbol downloads from symbol servers [default: False]

options.name: --symbol-servers
options.description: Semicolon-separated list of SSQP symbol server URLs (default: Microsoft + NuGet)

options.name: --symbol-cache
options.description: Directory path for persistent PDB symbol cache (default: ~/.debug-mcp/symbols)

options.name: --symbol-max-size
options.description: Maximum PDB file size to download in MB (default: 100)
